scripts.wyble:test-import: npx ts-node --project tsconfig.json import/testMusicXMLImport.ts && npx ts-node --project tsconfig.json import/testMusicXMLValidation.ts && npx ts-node --project tsconfig.json import/testMusicXMLToWybleIntegration.ts
scripts.wyble:test-all: npm run test && npm run wyble:test-import
